svg.title: Nova AI assistant — full pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart of Nova's input-to-output pipeline: voice or text input flows through _process_input in nova_router.py, with shortcuts for cache/location/history, internet search via InternetTools, route decisions for ReAct/tool/planner, then the planner pipeline through _handle_planner, context enrichment, TaskPlanner, ManagerAgent, and AgentExecutor with five agent types, followed by supervision and output to conversation history, TTS, LaTeX, affect, and memory.
